zh.Llanfaethlu, Anglesey, Wales: 威爾士安格萊利安法斯盧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad ferch Rhys於大約1350年出生在威爾士時，她的父親Rhys ap Robert21歲，母親Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd22歲。她和Dafydd ap Hywel至少有5個兒子和6個女兒。

zh-hans.Llanfaethlu, Anglesey, Wales: 威尔士安格萊利安法斯盧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angharad ferch Rhys于大约1350年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲Rhys ap Robert21岁，母亲Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd22岁。她和Dafydd ap Hywel至少有5个儿子和6个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad ferch Rhys was born about 1350, in Wales, her father, Rhys ap Robert, was 21 and her mother, Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 6 daughters with Dafydd ap Hywel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharad ferch Rhys est née environ 1350, à Galles, son père, Rhys ap Robert, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles avec Dafydd ap Hywel.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angharad ferch Rhys um 1350 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys ap Robert 21 und ihre Mutter Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd 22. Sie hatte mit Dafydd ap Hywel mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Rhys è nata il circa 1350 nel Galles, sua padre, Rhys ap Robert, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie con Dafydd ap Hywel.

ja.Rug, Merionethshire, Wales: ウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアルグ
ja.Llanfaethlu, Anglesey, Wales: ウェールズアングレセイランファエスル
ja.Nercwys, Flintshire, Wales: ウェールズフリントシュアイアネルクウイス
ja.Anglesey, Wales: ウェールズアングレセイ
ja.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Rhysが約1350年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Robertは21歳，母Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwydは22歳であった。彼女はDafydd ap Hywelとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Rhys(이)가 대략 1350년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys ap Robert(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Dafydd ap Hywel(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Rhys nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Gales, seu pai, Rhys ap Robert, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas com Dafydd ap Hywel.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad ferch Rhys родилась около 1350 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени Rhys ap Robert было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Dafydd ap Hywel.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angharad ferch Rhys nació aproximadamente 1350, en Gales, su papá, Rhys ap Robert, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Gwladus Drahaus ferch Madog Llwyd, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas con Dafydd ap Hywel.
